scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c green,blue "npm run dev -w frontend" "npm run dev -w backend"
scripts.dev:mobile: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c green,blue "npm run dev -w frontend -- --host" "npm run dev -w backend"
scripts.ip:laptop: sh -c 'ipconfig getifaddr en0 || ipconfig getifaddr en1'
scripts.build: npm run build -w frontend && npm run build -w backend
